title: Multi-board item creation is stuck in automation loop

posts.author: cnaro (Christina)
posts.cookedHtml: I have multiple boards that where you can add items and those items are created in high level summary boards. I want to be able to account for someone entering an item directly into the summary board, and I need to roll it back to one of the lower level boards. Currently I have trigger automations set up and get into an endless loop of items being created in both boards. Any ideas on what order, or triggers should be used to circumvent a loop?

posts.author: cnaro (Christina)
posts.cookedHtml: I figured how how to do this with existing automations.
